steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what benefit the passage says visiting the museum provides to visitors.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'the museum is superior to others': The passage makes no comparison to other museums. ✗
  • Choice B — 'visiting helps visitors appreciate Wilder's works': The passage explicitly states guided tours and special events help visitors “find enjoyment in Wilder's works” — directly matching this claim. ✓
  • Choice C — 'exhibits cover other unmentioned writers': No other writers are mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — 'the museum is near other museums': The passage says nothing about proximity to other museums. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
